title: Recipe for Disaster: Defeating the Culinaromancer

startPoint.en: Enter the white portal in the banquet hall in Lumbridge Castle.
startPoint.es: Entra por el portal blanco en el salón de banquetes del Lumbridge Castle.

items.name: Ice gloves
items.display: Ice gloves for defeating Flambeed, or expect to fight unarmed

items.name: Boss
items.display: Certain armour and weapons for each boss

items.name: Shark
items.display: Good healing food, such as sharks

kills: Gelatinnoth Mother, level 91 (cannot be damaged with Necromancy)

rewards.display: An antique lamp, which gives 20,000 experience to any skill above 50 (Note: If your backpack is full upon defeating the Culinaromancer, the lamp can be found in your bank. If both your backpack and bank are full, it will be dropped to the floor.)

rewards.name: Culinaromancer's Chest
rewards.display: Full access to the Culinaromancer's Chest

text.en: Kill the Culinaromancer with any combat style.
text.es: Mata al Culinaromancer con cualquier estilo de combate.
